pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which defines TASK_PROJECT and copies the sample project there.
Verified by parsing the sample_project.xml file and finding the task with UID 22 is 'Set line and grade benchmarks'.
Verified by parsing the sample_project.xml file and checking the name of task UID 22.
Verified by parsing the sample_project.xml file and finding the resource with UID 7 is 'G.C. Survey Crew'.
Verified by parsing the sample_project.xml file and checking the name of resource UID 7.

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly identifies the project file path as /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml based on the environment setup scripts. Within the MS Project sample file (sample_project.xml), the task UID 22 is confirmed to be named 'Set line and grade benchmarks'. Additionally, the resource with UID 7 is confirmed to be named 'G.C. Survey Crew'. The initial assignment of resource 7 to task 22 is explicitly removed during setup, ensuring the task starts in the expected state.
